### Volume Attachment

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Attach Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Timestamp of when the attachment was initiated</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Delete On Termination</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies whether to delete the EBS volume when the instance is terminated</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Device</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the device</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Instance Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>State</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Attachment state of the volume</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Volume Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the volume</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### IP Permission

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>From Port</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Start of port range for the TCP and UDP protocols, or an ICMP/ICMPv6 type number.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Ip Protocol</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the IP protocol. Valid values include:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>tcp</code></p></li><li><p><code>udp</code></p></li><li><p><code>icmp</code></p></li><li><p><code>icmpv6</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Ipv4 Ranges</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>IPv4 ranges.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Ipv6 Ranges</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>IPv6 ranges.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Prefix List Ids</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Prefix list IDs.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>To Port</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>End of the port range for the TCP and UDP protocols, or an ICMP/ICMPv6 code.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>User Id Group Pairs</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#UserIdGroupPair">User ID Group Pair</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### User ID Group Pair

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Group Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the security group.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Group Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the security group. Use this parameter for a security group in EC2-Classic or a default VPC only.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Peering Status</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If applicable, status of the VPC peering connection.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>User Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>AWS account ID.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Vpc Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If applicable, VPC ID for the referenced security group.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Vpc Peering Connection Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>VPC peering connection ID, if applicable.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Key Pair

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Key Fingerprint</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>SHA-1 digest of the DER encoded private key if CreateKeyPair was used to create the key pair. If ImportKeyPair was used to create the key pair, this is the MD5 public key fingerprint as described in section 4 of RFC4716.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Material</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the key pair.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Network Interface

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Association</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetworkInterfaceAssociation">Network Interface Association</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attachment</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetworkInterfaceAttachment">Network Interface Attachment</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Availability Zone</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Availability zone</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Description</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Description for the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Groups</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#GroupIdentifier">Group Identifier</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Security groups for the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Interface Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Type of network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Ipv6 Addresses</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>IPv6 addresses associated with the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Mac Address</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>MAC address of the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Network Interface Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Owner Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>AWS account ID of the owner of the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Private Dns Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the private DNS</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Private Ip Address</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>IPv4 address of the network interface within the subnet</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Private Ip Addresses</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#NetworkInterfacePrivateIpAddress">Network Interface Private IP Address</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Private IPv4 addresses associated with the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Requester Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Entity ID that launched the instance on your behalf</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Requester Managed</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Whether the network interface is managed by AWS</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Source Dest Check</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies whether to validate traffic to or from the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Status</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Status of the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Subnet Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the subnet</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Tag Set</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#Tag">Tag</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Tags assigned to the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Vpc Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the VPC</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Network Interface Association

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Allocation Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Allocation ID</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Association Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Association ID</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Ip Owner Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Elastic IP address owner ID</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Public Dns Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the public DNS</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Public Ip</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Elastic IP address bound to the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Network Interface Attachment

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Attach Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time the attachment was initiated.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attachment Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Network interface attachment ID.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Delete On Termination</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If <code>true</code>, deletes the network interface when the instance is terminated.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Device Index</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Device index of the network interface attachment on the instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Instance Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Instance Owner Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>AWS account ID of the instance owner.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Status</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Attachment state. Valid values include:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>attaching</code></p></li><li><p><code>attached</code></p></li><li><p><code>detaching</code></p></li><li><p><code>detached</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Group Identifier

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Group Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the security group</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Group Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the security group</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Network Interface Private IP Address

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Association</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetworkInterfaceAssociation">Network Interface Association</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Primary</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If <code>true</code>, the IPv4 address is the primary private IPv4 address of the network interface.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Private Dns Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the private DNS.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Private Ip Address</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Private IPv4 address.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Tag

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Key</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Key of the tag. Tag keys are case-sensitive and have a maximum of 127 Unicode characters. The tag key cannot begin with <code>aws:</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Value of the tag. Tag values are case-sensitive and have a maximum of 255 Unicode characters.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Private IP Address Specification

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Primary</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If <code>true</code>, the IPv4 address is the primary private IPv4 address. There can be only one primary IPv4.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Private Ip Address</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Private IPv4 addresses.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Snapshot

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Data Encryption Key Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Data encryption key identifier for the snapshot.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Description</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Description of the snapshot.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Encrypted</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If <code>true</code>, the snapshot is encrypted.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Kms Key Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ARN of the AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer key (CMK) used to protect the volume encryption key for the parent volume.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Owner Alias</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>AWS owner alias from the Amazon-maintained list. This is not the AWS account alias that was set using the IAM console.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Owner Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>AWS account ID of the snapshot owner.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Progress</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Percentage of progress of the snapshot.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Snapshot Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the snapshot.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Start Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time when the snapshot was initiated.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>State</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The state of the snapshot. Valid values include:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>pending</code></p></li><li><p><code>completed</code></p></li><li><p><code>error</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>State Message</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Displays details about the state of the snapshot to help you diagnose why an error occurs.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Tags</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#Tag">Tag</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Tags associated with the snapshot.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Volume Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the volume that was used to create the snapshot.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Volume Size</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Size of the volume in GiB.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Volume

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Attachments</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#VolumeAttachment">Volume Attachment</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Availability Zone</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Availability zone for the volume.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Create Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time the creation of the volume is initiated.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Encrypted</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If <code>true</code>, the volume is encrypted.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Iops</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Number of I/O operation per second that the volume supports.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Kms Key Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ARN of the AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer key (CMK) used to protect the volume encryption key for the parent volume.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Size</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Size of the volume in GiB.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Snapshot Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the snapshot.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>State</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>State of the volume. String can be:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>creating</code></p></li><li><p><code>available</code></p></li><li><p><code>in-use</code></p></li><li><p><code>deleting</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Tags</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#Tag">Tag</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Tags associated with the volume</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Volume Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the volume</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Volume Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Volume type. String can be:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>standard</code></p></li><li><p><code>io1</code></p></li><li><p><code>io2</code></p></li><li><p><code>gp2</code></p></li><li><p><code>sc1</code></p></li><li><p><code>st1</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Address

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Allocation Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Allocation ID</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Association Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the association of the address with a VPC instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Domain</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies whether to use the Elastic IP address with instances in a VPC (<code>vpc</code>) or in EC2-Class (<code>standard</code>)</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Instance Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the instance the address is associated with</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Network Interface Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Network Interface Owner Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the AWS account that owns the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Private Ip Address</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Private IP address that is associated with the Elastic IP address</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Public Ip</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Elastic IP address</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Filter

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>(DEPRECATED) Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Use the <strong>Filter Name</strong> field instead. Name of the filter. Filter names are case-sensitive.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Filter Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the filter. Filter names are case-sensitive.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Values</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Filter values, which are case-sensitive</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Availability Zone

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Messages</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Messages about the availability zone</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Region Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the region</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>State</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>State of the availability zone. Valid values include:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>available</code></p></li><li><p><code>information</code></p></li><li><p><code>impaired</code></p></li><li><p><code>unavailable</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Zone Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the availability zone</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Image Attribute

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Block Device Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#BlockDeviceMapping">Block Device Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Block device mapping entries.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Description</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Description for the image.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Image Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the image.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Kernel Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the kernel associated with the image.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Launch Permissions</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#LaunchPermission">Launch Permission</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Launch permissions associated with the AMI.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Product Codes</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ProductCode">Product Code</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Product codes associated with the AMI.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Ramdisk Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>RAM disk associated with the image. This parameter applies only to machine images.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Sriov Net Support</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Whether enhanced networking with the Intel 82599 Virtual Function interface is enabled.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Block Device Mapping

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Device Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the device</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Ebs</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#EbsBlockDevice">EBS Block Device</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Used to automatically set up EBS volumes when the instance is launched</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>No Device</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specify a device to suppress in the block device mapping of the AMI</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Virtual Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Virtual device name</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### EBS Block Device

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Delete On Termination</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If <code>true</code>, the EBS volume is deleted when the instance is terminated</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Encrypted</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Determines whether the encryption state of an EBS volume is changed when it is restored from a backing snapshot</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Iops</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Number of I/O operations per second the volume supports</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Snapshot Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the snapshot</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Volume Size</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Size of the volume in GiB</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Volume Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Type of volume. Valid values include:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>standard</code></p></li><li><p><code>io1</code></p></li><li><p><code>io2</code></p></li><li><p><code>gp2</code></p></li><li><p><code>sc1</code></p></li><li><p><code>st1</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>gp2</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Launch Permission

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Group</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the group</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>User Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>AWS account ID</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Image

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Architecture</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Architecture of the image.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Block Device Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#BlockDeviceMapping">Block Device Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Block device mapping entries.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Creation Date</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Date and time the image was created.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Description</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Ena Support</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If <code>true</code>, enhanced networking with ENA is enabled.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Hypervisor</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Hypervisor type of the image.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Image Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>AMI ID.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Image Location</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Location of the AMI.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Image Owner Alias</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>AWS account alias, or AWS account ID of the AMI owner.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Image Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Type of image. Valid values include:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>machine</code></p></li><li><p><code>kernel</code></p></li><li><p><code>ramdisk</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Kernel Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the kernel associated with the image, if applicable.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the AMI provided when the image was created.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Owner Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>AWS account ID of the image owner.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Platform</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>For Windows AMIs, this value is set to <code>windows</code>, otherwise, it is left blank.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Product Codes</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ProductCode">Product Code</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Product codes associated with the AMI.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Public</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If <code>true</code>, the image has <code>public</code> launch permissions; if <code>false</code>, the image has only implicit and explicit launch permissions.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Ramdisk Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the RAM disk associated with the image. This parameter is applicable only to <code>machine</code> image types.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Root Device Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Device name of the root device volume, for example: <code>/dev/sda1</code>.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Root Device Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Type of root device used by the AMI. Valid values include:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>ebs</code></p></li><li><p><code>instance-store</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Sriov Net Support</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Whether enhanced networking with the Intel 82599 Virtual Function interface is enabled.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>State</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>State of the image.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>State Reason</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#StateReason">State Reason</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Reason for the state change.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Tags</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#Tag">Tag</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Tags associated with the image.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Virtualization Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Type of virtualization of the AMI. Valid values include:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>hvm</code></p></li><li><p><code>paravirtual</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### State Reason

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Code</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Reason code for the state change.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Message</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Message for the state change:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>Server.InsufficientInstanceCapacity</code><br>There was insufficient capacity available to satisfy the launch request.</p></li><li><p><code>Server.InternalError</code><br>An internal error caused the instance to terminate during launch.</p></li><li><p><code>Server.ScheduledStop</code><br>The instance was stopped due to a scheduled retirement.</p></li><li><p><code>Server.SpotInstanceShutdown</code><br>The instance was stopped because the number of Spot requests with a maximum price equal to or higher than the Spot price exceeded available capacity or because of an increase in the Spot price.</p></li><li><p><code>Server.SpotInstanceTermination</code><br>The instance was terminated because the number of Spot requests with a maximum price equal to or higher than the Spot price exceeded available capacity or because of an increase in the Spot price.</p></li><li><p><code>Client.InstanceInitiatedShutdown</code><br>The instance was shut down using the shutdown -h command from the instance.</p></li><li><p><code>Client.InstanceTerminated</code><br>The instance was terminated or rebooted during AMI creation.</p></li><li><p><code>Client.InternalError</code><br>Client error caused the instance to terminate during launch.</p></li><li><p><code>Client.InvalidSnapshot.NotFound</code><br>Specified snapshot was not found.</p></li><li><p><code>Client.UserInitiatedHibernate</code><br>Hibernation was initiated on the instance.</p></li><li><p><code>Client.UserInitiatedShutdown</code><br>Instance was shut down using the Amazon EC2 API.</p></li><li><p><code>Client.VolumeLimitExceeded</code><br>Limit on the number of EBS volumes or total storage was exceeded. Decrease usage or request an increase in your account limits.</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Instance Attribute

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Block Device Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#InstanceBlockDeviceMapping">Instance Block Device Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Disable Api Termination</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If the value is <code>true</code>, the instance canât be terminated using the Amazon EC2 console, CLI, or API. If the value is <code>false</code>, you can terminate the instance using the Amazon EC2 console, CLI, or API.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Ebs Optimized</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Whether to optimize the instance for Amazon EBS I/O. This is not available with all instance types, as there additional usage charges associated with using an EBS Optimized instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Ena Support</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If <code>true</code>, enhanced networking with ENA is enabled.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Groups</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#GroupIdentifier">Group Identifier</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Instance Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Instance Initiated Shutdown Behavior</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies whether to stop or terminate the instance when shutdown is initiated from the instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Instance Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Type of instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Kernel Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the kernel associated with the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Product Codes</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ProductCode">Product Code</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Ramdisk Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the RAM disk associated with the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Root Device Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Device name of the root device volume</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Source Dest Check</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A value of <code>true</code> means that source or destination checking is enabled. A value of <code>false</code> means that source or destination checking is disabled. The value must be <code>false</code> for an instance that is launched in a VPC to perform NAT.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Sriov Net Support</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Whether enhanced networking with the Intel 82599 Virtual Function interface is enabled.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>User Data</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>User data.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Instance Block Device Mapping

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Device Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the device</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Ebs</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#EbsInstanceBlockDevice">EBS Instance Block Device</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### EBS Instance Block Device

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Attach Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Timestamp for when the attachment was initiated.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Delete On Termination</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Whether to delete the instance upon termination.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Status</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>State of the attachment. Valid values include:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>attaching</code></p></li><li><p><code>attached</code></p></li><li><p><code>detaching</code></p></li><li><p><code>detached</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Volume Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the volume.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Instance Status

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Availability Zone</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Availability zone for the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Events</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#InstanceStatusEvent">Instance Status Event</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Instance Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Instance State</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#InstanceState">Instance State</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Instance Status</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#InstanceStatusSummary">Instance Status Summary</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>System Status</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#InstanceStatusSummary">Instance Status Summary</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Instance Status Event

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Code</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Code for the event. Valid values include:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>instance-reboot</code></p></li><li><p><code>system-reboot</code></p></li><li><p><code>system-maintenance</code></p></li><li><p><code>instance-retirement</code></p></li><li><p><code>instance-stop</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Description</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Description of the event.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Not After</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies the latest scheduled time the event can end.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Not Before</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies the earliest scheduled time the event can start.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Instance State

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Code</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>16-bit unsigned integer state code of the instance. Valid values include:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>0 : pending</code></p></li><li><p><code>16 : running</code></p></li><li><p><code>32 : shutting-down</code></p></li><li><p><code>48 : terminated</code></p></li><li><p><code>64 : stopping</code></p></li><li><p><code>80 : stopped</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Instance Status Summary

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Details</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#InstanceStatusDetails">Instance Status Details</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Status</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Status of the instance. Valid values include:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>ok</code></p></li><li><p><code>impaired</code></p></li><li><p><code>insufficient-data</code></p></li><li><p><code>not-applicable</code></p></li><li><p><code>initializing</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Instance Status Details

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Impaired Since</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Timestamp of the status check failure.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Type of the instance status. Valid value is <code>reachability</code>.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Status</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Status of the instance. Valid values include:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>passed</code></p></li><li><p><code>failed</code></p></li><li><p><code>insufficient-data</code></p></li><li><p><code>initializing</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Reservation

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Group Names</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Names of the groups</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Groups</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#GroupIdentifier">Group Identifier</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Instances</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#Instance">Instance</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Owner Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the AWS account that owns the reservation</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Requester Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the requester that launched the instances, for example, AWS Management Console</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reservation Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the reservation</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Instance

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Ami Launch Index</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>AMI launch index that to use to find this instance in the launch group</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Architecture</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Image architecture. Valid values include:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>i386</code></p></li><li><p><code>x86_64</code></p></li><li><p><code>arm64</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Block Device Mappings</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#InstanceBlockDeviceMapping">Instance Block Device Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Client Token</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Idempotency token that was provided when the instance was launched</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Cpu Options</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#CpuOptions">CPU Options</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>CPU options for the instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Ebs Optimized</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Whether to optimize the instance for Amazon EBS I/O. This is not available with all instance types, as there additional usage charges associated with using an EBS Optimized instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Ena Support</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies whether to enable enhanced networking with ENA</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Hypervisor</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Hypervisor type of the instance. Valid values include:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>ovm</code></p></li><li><p><code>xen</code><br>The <code>xen</code> value is used for both Xen and Nitro hypervisors</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Iam Instance Profile</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#IamInstanceProfile">IAM Instance Profile</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Image Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the AMI used to launch the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Instance Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Instance Lifecycle</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies the lifecycle of the instance. Valid values include:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>spot</code></p></li><li><p><code>scheduled</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Instance Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Type of instance. See the <a href="https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/APIReference/API_Instance.html">Amazon API Reference</a> for valid values.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Kernel Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the kernel associated with the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the key pair associated with the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Launch Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time the instance was launched</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Monitoring</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Monitoring for the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Network Interfaces</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#InstanceNetworkInterface">Instance Network Interface</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Placement</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Placement">Placement</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Platform</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Valid value is <code>Windows</code> for instances launched on a Windows platform. Otherwise, leave this value blank.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Private Dns Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>For IPv4, this is the private DNS hostname assigned to the instance. The DNS hostname can only be used inside the Amazon EC2 network and is not available until the instance is in the <code>running</code> state.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Private Ip Address</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Private IPv4 address assigned to the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Product Codes</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ProductCode">Product Code</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Product codes attached to the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Public Dns Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Public DNS name</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Public Ip Address</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Public IP address assigned to the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Ramdisk Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the RAM disk associated with the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Root Device Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the root device volume</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Root Device Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Type of the root device used by the AMI. Valid values include:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>ebs</code></p></li><li><p><code>instance-store</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Security Groups</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#GroupIdentifier">Group Identifier</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Source Dest Check</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A value of <code>true</code> means that source or destination checking is enabled. A value of <code>false</code> means that source or destination checking is disabled. The value must be <code>false</code> for an instance that is launched in a VPC to perform NAT.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Spot Instance Request Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the request</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Sriov Net Support</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Whether enhanced networking with the Intel 82599 Virtual Function interface is enabled.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>State</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#InstanceState">Instance State</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>State Reason</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#StateReason">State Reason</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>State Transition Reason</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Subnet Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the subnet the instance is running in</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Tags</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#Tag">Tag</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Virtualization Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Virtualization type of the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Vpc Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the VPC the instance is running in</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### CPU Options

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Core Count</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Number of CPU cores for the instance.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Threads Per Core</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Number of threads per CPU core.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Instance Network Interface

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Association</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#InstanceNetworkInterfaceAssociation">Instance Network Interface Association</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attachment</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#InstanceNetworkInterfaceAttachment">Instance Network Interface Attachment</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Description</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Description of the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Groups</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#GroupIdentifier">Group Identifier</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Ipv6 Addresses</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>IPv6 addresses associated with the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Mac Address</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>MAC address of the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Network Interface Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Owner Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the AWS account that created the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Private Dns Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the private DNS</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Private Ip Address</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>IPv4 address of the network interface that is within the subnet</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Private Ip Addresses</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#InstancePrivateIpAddress">Instance Private IP Address</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Source Dest Check</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A value of <code>true</code> means that source or destination checking is enabled. A value of <code>false</code> means that source or destination checking is disabled. The value must be <code>false</code> for an instance that is launched in a VPC to perform NAT.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Status</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Network interface status. Valid values are:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>available</code></p></li><li><p><code>associated</code></p></li><li><p><code>attaching</code></p></li><li><p><code>in-use</code></p></li><li><p><code>detaching</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Subnet Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the subnet</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Vpc Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the VPC</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Instance Network Interface Association

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Ip Owner Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the Elastic IP address owner</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Public Dns Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Public DNS name</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Public Ip</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Public IP address or Elastic IP address that is bound to the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Instance Network Interface Attachment

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Attach Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>DateTime</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Timestamp of when the attachment was initiated</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attachment Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the network interface attachment</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Delete On Termination</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies whether to delete the instance when itâs terminated</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Device Index</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Index of the device that is on the instance for the network interface attachment</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Status</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>State of the attachment</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Instance Private IP Address

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Association</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#InstanceNetworkInterfaceAssociation">Instance Network Interface Association</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Primary</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If <code>true</code>, designates this IPv4 address as the primary private IP address of the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Private Dns Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Private IPv4 DNS name</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Private Ip Address</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Private IPv4 address of the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Placement

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Affinity</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Affinity setting for the instance on the dedicated host</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Availability Zone</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Availability Zone of the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Group Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the placement group that contains the instance</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Host Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the dedicated host</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Tenancy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Tenancey of the instance, if the instance is running in a VPC</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Key Pair Info

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Key Fingerprint</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>SHA-1 digest of the DER encoded private key if CreateKeyPair was used to create the key pair. If ImportKeyPair was used to create the key pair, this is the MD5 public key fingerprint as described in section 4 of RFC4716.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the key pair</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Move Address Status

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Move Status</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Status of the Elastic IP address to move to the EC2-VPC platform, or to restore to the EC2-Classic platform. Valid values include:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>movingToVpc</code></p></li><li><p><code>restoringToClassic</code></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Public Ip</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Elastic IP address</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Repeatable In Memory Iterable

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Initial Buffer Size</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The number of instances to initially keep in memory to consume the stream and provide random access to it. If the stream contains more data than can fit into this buffer, then the buffer expands according to <strong>Buffer size increment</strong>, with an upper limit of maxInMemorySize. Default value is 100 instances.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>100</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Buffer Size Increment</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>This is by how much the buffer size expands if it exceeds its initial size. Setting a value of zero or lower means that the buffer should not expand, meaning that a <code>STREAM_MAXIMUM_SIZE_EXCEEDED</code> error is raised when the buffer gets full. Default value is 100 instances.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Max Buffer Size</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The maximum amount of memory to use. If more than that is used then a STREAM_MAXIMUM_SIZE_EXCEEDED error is raised. A value lower than or equal to zero means no limit.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Repeatable File Store Iterable

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Max in Memory Size</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The maximum number of instances to keep in memory. If more than that is required, content starts to buffer on disk.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Buffer Unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>BYTE</p></li><li><p>KB</p></li><li><p>MB</p></li><li><p>GB</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The unit in which maxInMemorySize is expressed</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Describe Network Interface Attribute Result

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Attachment</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#NetworkInterfaceAttachment">Network Interface Attachment</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Description</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Description of the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Groups</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#GroupIdentifier">Group Identifier</a></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Network Interface Id</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>ID of the network interface</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Source Dest Check</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A value of <code>true</code> means that source or destination checking is enabled. A value of <code>false</code> means that source or destination checking is disabled. The value must be <code>false</code> for an instance that is launched in a VPC to perform NAT.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>
